---
title: "OC17 contig taxonomy abundance"
output: html_document
date: "2024-06-20"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(ggthemes)
library(pals)
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
rootdir = "/scratch/users/rsalcedo/OC17wc_deepauto/gene_based/contig_taxonomy/"
homedir = "/scratch/users/rsalcedo/OC17wc_deepauto/gene_based/"
scaffoldtax = read_csv(paste(rootdir, "revision_scaffold_taxonomy_2500bp.csv", sep = ""))
sample_list = c("3000m1000m", "3000m150m", "3000m2000m", "3000m3000m", "3000m500m", "3000m50m", "3500m1000m", "3500m150m", "3500m2000m", "3500m3000m", "3500m500m", "3500m50m", "4000m1000m", "4000m150m", "4000m2000m", "4000m3000m", "4000m500m", "4000m50m", "4500m150m", "4500m2000m", "4500m3000m", "4500m4000m", "4500m500m", "4500m50m", "500m150m", "500m500m", "500m50m", "4500m1000m")
```

```{r}
#read in gene info
gene_info = read_csv(paste0(homedir, "R_output/supptable_genes_06152026.csv"))

#rename for matching columns
gene_info = gene_info %>%
  rename("gene_coverage" = "coverage") %>%
  rename("gene_breadth" = "breadth") %>%
  rename("gene_breadth_minCov" = "breadth_minCov")

#add in scaffold/gene taxonomy and format table
supptable_gene_tax = merge(gene_info, scaffoldtax, by = "scaffold", all.x = TRUE)

select(supptable_gene_tax, "scaffold", "gene", "KO", "reconciled_taxonomy")
write.csv(supptable_gene_tax, paste0(rootdir, "/supptable_gene_tax_06152026.csv"))

#count n taxonomy encoding KO K15016
count_K15016 <- supptable_gene_tax %>%
  filter(KO == "K15016") %>%
  group_by(reconciled_taxonomy) %>%
  summarise(count = n())

```

move all instrain gene_info.tsv's to a single folder
```{r}
#for gzipped ones
sink(paste0(homedir,"scaffold_gzip_cp.sh"))

for(i in sample_list) {
  cat("cp ", homedir, "inStrain/", i, "_inStrain/output/", i, "_inStrain_scaffold_info.tsv.gz ", homedir, "inStrain/scaffold_info/","\n", sep = "")
}
sink()

file.show(paste0(homedir,"scaffold_gzip_cp.sh"))
```

```{r}
#for non gzipped ones

sink(paste0(homedir,"scaffold_cp.sh"))
for(i in sample_list) {
  cat("cp ", homedir, "inStrain/", i, "_inStrain/output/", i, "_inStrain_scaffold_info.tsv ", homedir, "inStrain/scaffold_info/","\n", sep = "")
}
sink()

file.show(paste0(homedir,"scaffold_cp.sh"))

```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
for(i in sample_list) {                                           
  scaffold = read_tsv(paste(homedir, "inStrain/scaffold_info/", i, "_inStrain_scaffold_info.tsv", sep = ""), col_names = TRUE)
  scaffold = select(scaffold, c("scaffold", "length", "coverage", "breadth"))
  assign(paste("scaffold_", i, sep = ""), scaffold)
}

df_list = mget(ls(pattern = "scaffold_"))
scaffold_cov = bind_rows(df_list)


scaffold_cov$site = str_split_i(scaffold_cov$scaffold, "_", 2)
scaffold_cov$depth = str_split_i(scaffold_cov$scaffold, "_", 3)
scaffold_cov$sample = paste(scaffold_cov$site, scaffold_cov$depth, sep = "")
```

```{r}
merged = merge(scaffoldtax, scaffold_cov, by = "scaffold", all.x = TRUE)

sample_cov = merged %>% 
  group_by(sample) %>% 
  summarise(sample_coverage = sum(coverage))

merged_relative = left_join(merged, sample_cov, "sample")

merged_relative$relative = merged_relative$coverage/merged_relative$sample_cov
```

```{r}
merged_relative = merged_relative %>% mutate(site = ifelse(site == "4500m", "OC6", site))
merged_relative = merged_relative %>% mutate(site = ifelse(site == "4000m", "OC5", site))
merged_relative = merged_relative %>% mutate(site = ifelse(site == "3500m", "OC4", site))
merged_relative = merged_relative %>% mutate(site = ifelse(site == "3000m", "OC3", site))
merged_relative = merged_relative %>% mutate(site = ifelse(site == "500m", "OC2", site))

merged_relative = merged_relative %>% mutate(reconciled_taxonomy = ifelse(reconciled_taxonomy == "eukaryote", "Eukaryote", reconciled_taxonomy))
merged_relative = merged_relative %>% mutate(reconciled_taxonomy = ifelse(reconciled_taxonomy == "unclassified", "Unclassified", reconciled_taxonomy))
merged_relative = merged_relative %>% mutate(reconciled_taxonomy = ifelse(reconciled_taxonomy == "unclassifed", "Unclassified", reconciled_taxonomy))

unique(merged_relative$reconciled_taxonomy)

#drop those marked as euks
merged_relative_noeuks = merged_relative %>% filter(reconciled_taxonomy != "Eukaryote")

```

```{r}

result <- merged_relative %>%
  filter(reconciled_taxonomy %in% c("Nitrospirota", "Nitrospinota")) %>%
  group_by(sample) %>%
  summarize(
    total_relative = sum(relative, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_scaffolds = n()
  )

# Print the result
print(result)

result <- merged_relative %>%
  filter(reconciled_taxonomy %in% c("Nitrososphaerota")) %>%
  group_by(sample) %>%
  summarize(
    total_relative = sum(relative, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_scaffolds = n()
  )

# Print the result
print(result)


```

```{r}
palette <- stepped(n=24)

palette <- c(
  "steelblue4", 
  "green4",
  "#6A3D9A", 
  "#FF7F00", 
  "khaki1",
  "gold1", 
  "#FB9A99", 
  "palegreen2",
  "yellow4", 
  "#FDBF6F", 
  "gray70", 
  "yellow3",
  "maroon", 
  "dodgerblue2",
  "turquoise3", 
  "plum4", 
  "skyblue", 
  "green1",
  "darkorange4", 
  "brown", 
  "black", 
  "lightgray", 
  "purple", 
  "deeppink"
)

ggplot(merged_relative_noeuks, aes(fill=reconciled_taxonomy, color = reconciled_taxonomy, y=relative, x=depth)) + 
  geom_bar(position="fill", stat="identity") +
  facet_grid(~factor(site, levels = c("OC6", "OC5", "OC4", "OC3", "OC2")))+
  coord_flip() +
  ylab("Relative Abundance of Scaffolds Containing Genes Involved in Autotrophic Pathways") +
  xlab("Depth") +
  theme_few() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", 
        strip.text = element_text(size = 16), 
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14)
        ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = palette) + 
  scale_x_discrete(limits=c("4000m","3000m","2000m", "1000m", "500m", "150m" ,"50m"))
  

ggsave(paste(rootdir, "/contigtax_abundance_06152026.pdf", sep = ""), width = 15, height = 8, units = "in")
```
